scenario_descriptions: Practice having a natural conversation in a {context}. You'll learn key phrases for {skill} and improve your confidence.
In this scenario, you'll role-play as {role} dealing with {situation}. Focus on polite expressions and professional vocabulary.
A realistic {context} scenario designed for {level} learners. Master common phrases and cultural nuances.
Step into a {context} and practice {skill}. This scenario includes vocabulary hints and pronunciation checkpoints.
Build your confidence with this {context} simulation. Learn to handle unexpected questions and keep the conversation flowing.
conversation_ai_responses: That's a great point! Let me rephrase that for you...
Good try! Here's a more natural way to say that...
Excellent pronunciation! Now let's try a slightly more complex sentence.
I understand what you mean. In this context, you might want to say...
That's correct! You're making great progress. Let's continue with...

grammar_errors.original: I have went to the store
grammar_errors.correction: I have gone to the store

grammar_errors.explanation: 'Agree' is already a verb, no need for 'am'

grammar_errors.original: He is more taller than me
I look forward to hear from you
grammar_errors.correction: I look forward to hearing from you
grammar_errors.explanation: 'To' here is a preposition, followed by gerund

expression_suggestions.suggested: In my opinion / I believe / From my perspective
expression_suggestions.reason: Varied ways to express opinions in professional settings

expression_suggestions.suggested: I'd like to / I'm hoping to / I'm looking to
Could you assist me with...? / Would you mind helping me with...?
expression_suggestions.reason: More formal and polite request forms

expression_suggestions.suggested: I apologize for... / Please excuse... / I regret that...

positive: Love the conversation feature! It really helps me practice speaking.
The pronunciation feedback is so detailed, especially the phoneme breakdown.
Great app for learning English on the go. The scenarios are very realistic.
The spaced repetition system helped me remember vocabulary much better.
The AI responses feel very natural, almost like talking to a real person.
neutral: The app is good but could use more advanced scenarios for business English.
Pronunciation scoring seems a bit inconsistent sometimes.
Would be nice to have more travel scenarios for Southeast Asia.
negative: The AI sometimes gives responses that don't match the conversation context.
Free tier limit of 3 conversations per day is too restrictive.

review_reminder: You have {count} words due for review today. Keep your streak going!
Time to review! {count} vocabulary cards are waiting for you.
Don't forget your daily review! {count} cards due.
achievement: Achievement unlocked: {achievement}! Keep up the great work!
system: Welcome to RealTalk English! Start your first conversation now.
New scenarios added: Check out our latest workplace English pack.
Your subscription will expire in 3 days. Renew now to keep learning.

approve: Content quality meets standards. Dialogue flow is natural and educational.
Good scenario design with appropriate difficulty progression. Approved for publication.
Well-structured dialogue with helpful vocabulary highlights. Ready for learners.
reject: Dialogue nodes need more variety. Currently too repetitive in AI responses.
Difficulty level doesn't match content. Intermediate scenario but uses advanced grammar.
Missing cultural context notes. Please add hints for Chinese-speaking learners.
Scenario is too short. Minimum 3 dialogue rounds required per CN006.

scenario_descriptions: 外卖点错太尴尬？练练地道表达，吃啥都顺心！
出国迷路别抓瞎，3分钟掌握问路神技，玩得更自在。
面试卡壳急死人？模拟真实对话，让你对答如流拿offer！
酒店check-in手忙脚乱？学会这几招，入住秒变轻松。
看病沟通像听天书？练练医疗英语，健康不掉链子。
商场砍价被宰哭？掌握砍价黑话，省钱又省心。
约会冷场太尴尬？提升聊天技能，轻松撩到心动对象。
菜单看得一脸懵？练练点餐英语，吃出国际范儿。
打车被绕晕头转向？学会指路英语，直达目的地不踩坑。
聚会插不上话？社交英语练起来，秒变话题中心。
客服电话听不懂？搞定投诉套路，问题秒解决。
课堂提问腿发软？学术英语突击，回答自信爆棚。
退货扯皮心累？练练售后英语，维权快人一步。
值机排长队急死？通关英语速成，登机不慌不忙。
租房被坑懵？砍价英语来救命，省下大把银子。
ai_encouragement: 哇塞，这句说得贼溜！再接再厉啊～
太棒了！进步肉眼可见，继续冲！
发音绝了，跟native speaker有啥区别？
对话超流畅，你这水平可以出师啦！
厉害了！刚才那句我直接给满分！
别停啊，你已经上道了，稳得很～
天呐，这进步神速，必须点赞！
说得太溜了，我都想偷师了哈哈～
自信感拉满！再练几次绝对大神级别。
哇，这语感绝了，多练点要起飞啊！
太有天赋了，这水平稳赢～
棒棒哒！每次对话都比上次强，服了！
这句完美！再来一发？我看好你哦～
进步太明显，我都想给你颁个奖！
说得太溜，感觉你明天就能环游世界了！
review_reminders: 单词快溜走啦？10分钟复习，稳住不掉线！
偷懒可不行～点这里复习，记得更牢！
今天单词忘光光？5分钟回血，秒变学霸。
记忆黄金期到！复习一下，效果翻倍～
单词在喊救命！速来巩固，别让努力白费。
拖延症犯了？复习5分钟，明天更轻松～
温故知新小妙招：点我复习，进步蹭蹭涨！
单词小分队等你归队！10分钟搞定，超简单。
别让努力打水漂，复习一下再摸鱼～
大脑说：再复习一次，记得更久！快点～
偷懒一时爽，复习火葬场～5分钟搞定它！
单词需要你宠幸！速来复习，状态拉满。
今天欠复习？点这里补课，秒回巅峰状态。
记忆不牢？复习10分钟，效果大不同～
单词在偷笑你忘啦！5分钟拯救记忆，冲！
achievement_notifications: 恭喜解锁【外卖王者】！点餐如点将，牛批～
哇塞！达成【旅游英语通】成就，路痴变活地图！
面试开挂成功！【offer收割机】成就已点亮，太强了！
酒店入住0失误！【通关小能手】成就到手，稳～
看病沟通无压力！【健康守护者】成就拿下，为你鼓掌！
商场砍价省大钱！【省钱达人】成就get，精明如你！
约会聊天不冷场！【魅力爆棚】成就解锁，撩人必备～
餐厅点餐超顺溜！【美食达人】成就到手，吃货之光！
打车直达不绕路！【路痴克星】成就达成，导航都服！
聚会全场焦点！【社交天花板】成就解锁，人气王就是你！
客服电话秒解决！【维权高手】成就get，问题退退退～
课堂发言超自信！【学术新星】成就点亮，老师都夸！
网购退货不扯皮！【网购王者】成就到手，省心100分！
机场通关神速！【旅行达人】成就达成，说走就走～
租房砍价成功！【精明租客】成就解锁，钱包笑开花！

workplace.definition: The latest time by which something should be completed
A person with an interest or concern in a business
A list of items to be discussed at a meeting
A thing able to be provided, especially a product of work
To increase in intensity or make more serious
The interaction of elements that produces a combined effect
To use something to maximum advantage
A standard or point of reference against which things may be compared

travel.definition: A document that allows a passenger to board an aircraft
A period of rest during a journey
Desirable features of a building or place
An arrangement to have something held for one's use
The process of changing one currency to another

daily_life.definition: A doctor's written direction for medicine
Physical or mental signs of a condition or disease
A practice or arrangement for financial protection
A sum of money placed in a bank account
The process of registering for a service or school
